title: Privacy Policy
intro: At Take & Bring, protecting your personal data is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the rights you have. It applies to our website and the services we provide.

sections.heading: 1. Who we are
body: Take & Bring GmbH, based in Bergisch Gladbach, Germany, is the controller responsible for the processing of your personal data described in this policy.
You can reach us by email at info@take-bring.eu or by phone at +49 2234 6889977 for any data protection questions.

sections.heading: 2. What data we collect
body: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and message when you submit a contact or quote request form.
We also collect limited technical data automatically, such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited, to operate and improve the website.

sections.heading: 3. How we use your data
body: We use your data to respond to your enquiries, prepare quotes, provide our logistics services, and communicate with you about your shipments.
We process this data on the basis of your consent, the performance of a contract, and our legitimate interest in operating our business and website.

sections.heading: 4. Sharing your data
body: We do not sell your personal data. We only share it with trusted service providers and carriers where necessary to deliver our services, and with authorities where required by law.
Any partners who process data on our behalf are bound by appropriate data protection agreements.

sections.heading: 5. Data retention
body: We keep your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described here, including any legal, accounting, or reporting obligations.

sections.heading: 6. Your rights
body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data, as well as the right to data portability and to object to processing.
To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@take-bring.eu. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

sections.heading: 7. Cookies
body: Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to ensure it functions correctly and to understand how it is used. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to this policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The latest version will always be available on this page with the date of the last update.
